creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks for the notification. 

Mark broken and deprecated: these fonts are unfetchable and we are not 
allowed to mirror them. 

Note: a newer version is available from 
http://support.wolfram.com/technotes/latestfonts.en.html 
but it does not fit the purpose of this port. 

This port was supported by Mozilla 1.8 (including Firefox 2.0) but for 
Firefox 3.x we need another port to install the STIX fonts. 

See: http://www.stixfonts.org/
